title: 1912 World Figure Skating Championships

infobox.value: [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom") [Louise Lovett](/w/index.php?title=Louise_Lovett&action=edit&redlink=1 "Louise Lovett (page does not exist)") / [Ernest Worsley](/w/index.php?title=Ernest_Worsley&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ernest Worsley (page does not exist)") | 37

The **[World Figure Skating Championships](/wiki/World_Figure_Skating_Championships "World Figure Skating Championships")** is an annual [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") sanctioned by the [International Skating Union](/wiki/International_Skating_Union "International Skating Union") in which [figure skaters](/wiki/Figure_skating "Figure skating") compete for the title of World Champion.

Men's competitions took place from 16 to 17 February in [Manchester](/wiki/Manchester "Manchester"), [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom"). Ladies' competitions took place from 27 to 28 January in [Davos](/wiki/Davos "Davos"), [Switzerland](/wiki/Switzerland "Switzerland"). Pairs' competition took place on 27 February also in [Manchester](/wiki/Manchester "Manchester"), [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom").
